relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains portfolio concentration analysis data (sectors, issuers, geography, regulatory compliance metrics), while the outbound file is a transaction hold notice for individual accounts. These serve fundamentally different purposes: one is aggregate portfolio risk reporting, the other is individual transaction blocking. No meaningful field overlap exists—inbound has no customer/account/transaction data, and outbound has no portfolio or concentration concepts. The files are unrelated despite both originating from risk_and_compliance.
